ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "quantile" REAL /* Quantile value representing the forecast probability */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Forecasted value for the given quantile */,
  "forecast_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the forecast type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the location */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the target */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was generated */,
  "target_end_date" TEXT /* End date for the forecast validity */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "trend_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the forecast trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the forecast trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_forecast_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_type_id") REFERENCES forecast_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location's service capabilities */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast type (e.g., quantile, mean) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description detailing the calculation or methodology used */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed description of the methodology */,
  "parameter1" TEXT /* Additional parameter 1 for the forecast type */,
  "parameter2" TEXT /* Additional parameter 2 for the forecast type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target for forecasting */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the target (e.g., inpatient, outpatient) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeframes" (
  "timeframe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeframe */,
  "timeframe_name" TEXT /* Name of the timeframe (e.g., 1 week, 1 month) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timeframe */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the timeframe */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the timeframe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeframe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_timeframes" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the forecast */,
  "timeframe_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the timeframe */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the forecast in this timeframe */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the forecast in this timeframe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id", "timeframe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
